author: Constantin Piber
message:
Introduce a setting for tracker download deletion (#29)

* Introduce a setting for tracker download deletion

* Version bump

author: Constantin Piber
message:
Handle GQL errors in OkHttp interceptor (#28)

* Handle GQL errors in OkHttp interceptor

This allows clients that perform manual GQL requests (like the tracker)
to take advantage of the interceptor

* Remove Apollo-specific interceptor

* Version bump

* `.use` response to avoid leaks

author: Constantin Piber
message:
TokenManager: Add credentials for basic auth (#27)

* TokenManager: Add credentials for basic auth

This is important for the tracker, since it uses this client, and
expects that basic auth should work. Before this, we added the basic
headers to Apollo, but not to OkHttp (but we added to headersBuilder,
which works for the reader, which does not use our client...)

* Bump version

Close response before re-attempt (#24)

* Bump version

author: Mitchell Syer
message: Forgot to Bump Version

author: Constantin Piber
message:
Support other Auth Modes (#23)

* Add AuthMode enum and migrate old login setting

* Add Preference for Auth Mode

* Fix fallback for migration

* Use old preferences instead of trying to migrate them

* Implement SIMPLE_LOGIN auth

* Use Lock

* Fix Cookie Login redirect detection

* Pass token to avoid duplicate logins

* Implement JWT auth

* Actual retry

Just using kotlin's `retry` doesn't work, because it does not use the
new headers, it just re-runs the entire flow. So instead wrap it in a
custom flow, which emits all values from Apollo, or switches to a new
request if necessary

* Add token headers in `headersBuilder` to allow regular requests

* Make Mutation results nullable

On failure, data will be null, and error set
https://www.apollographql.com/docs/kotlin/essentials/errors#truth-table

* Handle truncated "Unauthorized" message from mutations

* Add OkHttp Interceptor

Move TokenManager to a lazy value, since `client` is not lazy, but
`tokenManager` must not be evaluated immediately

* Update schema

author: Yip Rui Fung

Add more sorting options (#20)

1. Latest fetched chapter
2. Recently read

4. Downloaded chapter count
